creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:39:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    korean/ami           Makefile 
    korean/eterm         Makefile 
    korean/gdick         Makefile 
    korean/gtkcomm       Makefile 
    korean/imhangul      Makefile 
    korean/nabi          Makefile 
    korean/scim-hangul   Makefile 
    korean/scim-tables   Makefile 
    korean/stardict2-dict-kr Makefile 
    korean/texinfo       Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.41      +1 -1      ports/korean/ami/Makefile
  1.25      +1 -1      ports/korean/eterm/Makefile
  1.25      +1 -1      ports/korean/gdick/Makefile
  1.21      +1 -1      ports/korean/gtkcomm/Makefile
  1.17      +1 -1      ports/korean/imhangul/Makefile
  1.31      +1 -0      ports/korean/nabi/Makefile
  1.15      +1 -1      ports/korean/scim-hangul/Makefile
  1.18      +1 -1      ports/korean/scim-tables/Makefile
  1.5       +1 -1      ports/korean/stardict2-dict-kr/Makefile
  1.14      +1 -1      ports/korean/texinfo/Makefile
